title: Drops Are Randomized
description:
Every block you break drops completely random items.

Turn your world into pure chaos — mine dirt and get diamonds, or break stone and get something totally useless. You never know what you’ll get.

Perfect for challenge runs, speedruns, and unpredictable
body:
Double Blocks Challenge – Random Drops Edition

Turn your Minecraft world into complete chaos.

With this mod installed, every block you break will drop completely random items from the entire game. It doesn’t matter what you mine — dirt, stone, wood, or ores — the drops are no longer predictable. You could get something useless… or something incredibly powerful.

How it works:
- Breaking any block gives you normal drops PLUS random items
- The random items are chosen from ALL items in the game
- Each block gives a different result every time
- Works in survival and affects all blocks you mine

Examples:
- Break dirt → get diamonds
- Mine stone → get food, tools, or something random
- Chop wood → get anything from sticks to rare items

Why use this mod?
- Makes survival completely unpredictable
- Great for challenge runs and custom worlds
- Perfect for YouTube or streaming content
- Adds chaos without complicated mechanics

Important:
- This mod is designed for fun and randomness, not balance
- You may get very powerful items early
- You may also get completely useless items

If you’re looking for a new way to experience Minecraft where every block matters and nothing is guaranteed, this is the perfect challenge.

Have fun — and good luck :)
